data_collected.source_quote: The platform gathers a wide range of data, including identifiers like your name and email, payment information, geolocation data, and even call recordings with customer care.

purposes_of_collection.source_quote: Grubhub may disclose records to merchants, delivery providers, and service providers to provide services, comply with requirements, and enforce rights.

shared_for_advertising.source_quote: Grubhub may share information for cross-context behavioral advertising purposes under state privacy laws.

third_party_recipients.source_quote: Grubhub may disclose records of items you purchased to merchants, delivery providers, payment processors, and other service providers.

retention_period.source_quote: Grubhub and its third party service providers will retain personal information for at least the period reasonably necessary, unless required by law.

access_your_data.source_quote: You may request access or deletion of your personal information through links provided.

delete_your_data.source_quote: You may request access or deletion of order data through links provided for both Grubhub and Seamless.

opt_out_of_sale_sharing.source_quote: You have the right to opt out of processing or sharing for online cross-context behavioral advertising.

breach_notification.source_quote: Grubhub confirmed a security incident and stated it is implementing additional security enhancements.

independent_audits.source_quote: Grubhub uses penetration testing, code reviews, architecture analysis, and access control audits.

gaps: GPC and DNT signal handling not mentioned
label_notes: Grubhub collects extensive data including call recordings and geolocation. Shares data with merchants, delivery partners, and payment processors. Experienced security incident in 2026 but taking corrective action. Supports opt-out of behavioral advertising. Biometric data for delivery partners deleted within 3 years. Lacks transparency on encryption and MFA. Data can be transferred internationally with varying protection levels.
